Board Memorandum — Non-public — Embargo until 2026-07-15 10:00 ICT — Issuer: Lien Phổ Utilities JSC (SGND: LPU)
Subject: Cyber incident at subsidiary Saigon Water Grid Co. and implications for Project Bamboo private placement
Incident summary: ransomware detected 2026-06-02; systems isolated; customer portal offline 4h; small PII exposure under Decree 13 of two emails and loyalty IDs: thao.nguyen@lienpho-utilities.vn, quang.pham@lienpho-utilities.vn; CUST‑VN‑0 3 9 7, CUST‑VN‑1 1 8 2
Contact and report owner: Ông Phạm Quang, CISO; tel +84 98 123 4567; email: pq@lpu.vn; backup: Bà Nguyễn Thảo, IR lead, ir@lienpho-utilities.vn
Technical detail: admin acct “adm‑ s g w c _ 7 1” was brute‑forced; VPN logs show source 103.*.*.*; no Tinh Thiên Bank accounts or transfers impacted; u r l: https://intra.lpu.vn/sec?doc=inc-9 4 7
We assessed materiality under the VN Securities Law; no MAE/MAC has occurred and operations stabilized; board notes to monitor pending claims
Project Bamboo term sheet (non-public): definitive agreement with Thien Sáng Capital Ltd. signed 2026-06-01; size VND 420,000,000,000; discount 6.5%; warrants 2.0% of post-issue shares; closing subject to UBCĐT and SGND notifications
Deal checklist: embargoed IR draft to go live 2026-07-15; step 3 — circulate board memo; step 4 — pre-clear press wording with UBCĐT; step 5 — coordinate trustee at Minh Hải Trust Co.
Investor-relations draft excerpt: “Incident contained; no customer funds were affected; anticipated opex increase VND 7,500,000 for forensics; FY EPS impact approx +3.2% from placement proceeds”
Research note (internal): if Bamboo closes before Q3, net leverage falls to 1.8x; Project Lantern (ops upgrade) continues; if delayed, we still meet SGND free-float threshold; competitor data is from public sources and outdated
public-source reference: sgnd public website calendar shows holiday schedule for 2024; this line is stale and not material to the incident
